steps.title: Identify the appositive
steps.content: The blank names which gaseous compound has the stated molar mass. Because the compound name is essential identification, it should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Keep essential words together
steps.content: Choice A uses paired commas, treating the compound name as removable. Choice C adds a stray comma between the subject phrase and the verb. Choice D starts a nonessential phrase but never closes it. The no-comma version correctly keeps the identifying name essential. The answer is B.
